User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the SkillProof platform.

hashedPassword.description: Hashed password of the user. Stored securely after hashing.

otpSecret.description: Secret key used for OTP generation. This is sensitive; handle with care.

isEmailVerified.description: Indicates if the user's email address has been verified.

SkillProof.title: SkillProof
SkillProof.description: Represents a skill proof submitted by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the skill proof.

userId.description: Reference to the User who submitted this skill proof. (Relationship: User 1:N SkillProof)

skillName.description: Name of the skill being proven.

projectTitle.description: Title of the project used as evidence.

description.description: Short description of the project and skill.

githubRepoLink.description: Link to the GitHub repository of the project.

screenshotUrls.description: URLs of the screenshots uploaded as evidence.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the proof was created.

ContactMessage.title: ContactMessage
ContactMessage.description: Represents a message submitted through the Contact Us form.

id.description: Unique identifier for the contact message.

name.description: Name of the person sending the message.

email.description: Email address of the person sending the message.

sentAt.description: Timestamp when the message was sent.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. Uses path-based ownership for data privacy.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores skill proofs submitted by users. Organized as a subcollection of users, ensuring path-based ownership. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: skillProofId
params.description: The unique identifier for the skill proof.

definition.description: Stores messages submitted through the Contact Us form.

params.name: contactMessageId
params.description: The unique identifier for the contact message.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to provide a secure, scalable, and easily maintainable data model for the SkillProof application, focusing on authorization independence and clear access patterns. User data and skill proofs are stored in separate collections to maintain a homogeneous security posture. The `SkillProof` documents are stored as subcollections of the `users` collection, ensuring path-based ownership. This eliminates the need for complex `get()` calls in security rules, promoting atomic operations and straightforward debugging. Contact messages are stored in a separate top-level collection because their security requirements differ. This ensures that the structure supports the required QAPs (rules are not filters) by segregating data based on access control needs.
